title: 2025-08-05 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.83
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-08-05: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.83/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-08-05, the score printed 11.83/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
